statics.name: currentID
statics.description: The current Discord client ID. Setting this reinitializes the Discord connection.

statics.name: ready
statics.description: True if Discord RPC is connected and ready.

statics.name: initialized
statics.description: True if Discord RPC has been initialized.

statics.name: lastPresence
statics.description: The last presence that was set.

statics.name: config
statics.description: The loaded Discord config (clientID, logoKey, logoText).

statics.name: script
statics.description: The Discord script loaded from data/discord.

statics.name: anyResponse
statics.description: Signal dispatched on any raw Discord response.

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initializes Discord RPC and starts the callback thread.

functions.name: reloadJsonData
functions.description: Reloads the Discord config JSON from assets.

functions.name: loadScript
functions.description: Loads or reloads the Discord hscript from data/discord.

functions.name: changePresence
functions.description: Sets a simple Discord presence with details and state.

functions.name: changeSongPresence
functions.description: Sets presence with a song timer based on the current audio position.

functions.name: changePresenceSince
functions.description: Sets presence with a start timestamp.

functions.name: changePresenceAdvanced
functions.description: Sets a fully customized Discord presence.

functions.name: shutdown
functions.description: Shuts down Discord RPC and destroys the script.

functions.name: respond
functions.description: Responds to a join request. Use REPLY_YES, REPLY_NO, or REPLY_IGNORE.

functions.name: call
functions.description: Calls a function on the Discord script.

functions.name: sendCustomCommand
functions.description: Sends a raw custom command to Discord RPC.

functions.name: setDebugMode
functions.description: Enables or disables Discord RPC debug mode.
